title: Elon Musk Posts Armie Hammer’s Controversial Comeback Film ‘Citizen Vigilante’ on X
content:
ByJack Dunn

Elon Muskposted Armie Hammer’s “Citizen Vigilante” to his X accounton Friday, sharing the controversial indie-actioner with his 240 million followers. The link was active for about 48 hours and went dark on Saturday.

Directed and written by 60-year-old German filmmaker Uwe Boll, “Citizen Vigilante” was notably banned in his home country for depicting abhorrent violence and for being anti-migrant, according toThe Telegraph. The film was released in the U.S. on June 19.

“Citizen Vigilante” follows Hammer as an American abroad in Europe on a blood-soaked mission to eliminate all criminal migrants. Other cast members include Costas Mandylor, Désirée Giorgetti, Steffen Mennekes, Neb Chupin and Mukit Abdul Hamid.

InVariety’s review of the film, critic Todd Gilchrist minced no words, writing, “Boll, a cinematic embarrassment since the early 2000s, here delivers a violent, incoherent, morally bankrupt slice of exploitation on the same qualitative level as ‘House of the Dead,’ ‘Alone in the Dark’ and ‘BloodRayne.’ In fact, the film is so astonishingly bad, it almost feels like the writer-director-producer is deliberately sabotaging his starArmie Hammer, whose intended comeback can only be harmed by this project.”

Hammer, who starred in films like “The Social Network,” “Call Me By Your Name” and “Sorry to Bother You,” saw his career come crashing down in 2021 after facing allegations of sexual assault. Hammer denied the allegations, and in 2023, prosecutors declined to file charges against him.

Boll took to X on Saturday to reveal that “Citizen Vigilante 2” willrelease in 2027. The day prior, Musk replied to a post on X showing “Citizen Vigilante” as the No. 2 movie on the Apple TV charts. He wrote, “’Citizen Vigilante 2’ will be even better.”
title_zh: 伊隆·馬斯克(Elon Musk) 在 X 平台上發布了阿米·漢默(Armie Hammer) 爭議重返銀幕的電影《公民警戒者》(Citizen Vigilante)。
content_zh:
由Jack Dunn報導

埃隆·馬斯克(Elon Musk)在他的X帳戶上分享了阿米·漢默(Armie Hammer)的《公民義警》(Citizen Vigilante)，將這部具爭議性的獨立動作片介紹給他的2.4億追隨者。該連結活躍了約48小時，並於星期六關閉。

這部電影由60歲的德國導演烏維·鮑爾(Uwe Boll)執導和編劇，根據《電訊報》(The Telegraph)的報導，《公民義警》因描繪可憎的暴力和反移民內容而在他的祖國被禁。該片於6月19日在美國上映。

《公民義警》講述了漢默飾演的一名美國人在歐洲展開一場血腥的任務，目標是消滅所有犯罪移民。其他演員包括科斯塔斯·曼迪洛(Costas Mandylor)、德茲瑞·喬爾蓋提(Désirée Giorgetti)、斯特芬·梅內克斯(Steffen Mennekes)、內布·丘平(Neb Chupin)和穆基特·阿卜杜勒·哈米德(Mukit Abdul Hamid)。

在《綜藝》(Variety)對該片的評價中，影評人托德·吉爾克里斯特(Todd Gilchrist)直言不諱地寫道：“鮑爾自2000年代初以來一直是電影界的尷尬，這裡呈現出一部暴力、無法理解、道德淪喪的剝削片，其質量與《死亡之屋》(House of the Dead)、《黑暗中的孤獨》(Alone in the Dark)和《血腥雷恩》(BloodRayne)不相上下。事實上，這部電影糟糕得驚人，幾乎讓人感覺這位編劇、導演和製片人是在故意破壞他的明星阿米·漢默的復出，這個項目只會對他造成傷害。”

漢默曾參演《社交網路》(The Social Network)、《以你的名字呼喚我》(Call Me By Your Name)和《抱歉打擾你》(Sorry to Bother You)等影片，但在2021年因面臨性侵犯指控而使他的事業崩潰。漢默否認了這些指控，而在2023年，檢方決定不對他提出指控。

鮑爾於星期六在X上透露《公民義警2》(Citizen Vigilante 2)將於2027年上映。前一天，馬斯克回應了一則X上的帖子，顯示《公民義警》在Apple TV排行榜上名列第二。他寫道：“《公民義警2》會更好。”
summary_zh:
由Jack Dunn報導

埃隆·馬斯克(Elon Musk)在他的X帳戶上分享了阿米·漢默(Armie Hammer)的《公民義警》(Citizen Vigilante)，將這部具爭議性的獨立動作片介紹給他的2.4億追隨者。該連結活躍了約48小時，並於星期六關閉。
